name: Dazzling Glamour
outcome: Sparkling glimmers of light flare across [AttackerName]' luxurious outfit and gilded adornments, culminating in a captivating flash of light as she strikes an alluring pose to flaunt her heavy breasts and curvy hips, the dazing light show ensuring your focus is fully on her enchanting body!
miss: Sparkling glimmers of light flare across [AttackerName]' luxurious outfit and gilded adornments, culminating in a captivating flash of light as she strikes an alluring pose, but [TargetName] manages to ignore the enchanting display!
statusOutcome: Even as the magical attack's light fades, echoes of [AttackerName]' enthrallingly sexy body drift dizzily through [TargetName]'s vision, leaving [TargetHimOrHer] teetering in place in stunned mesmerization, [TargetHisOrHer] eyesight captured by remanent sights of the luxurious succubus' myriad of sensual poses!
